steps.name: Given there is TeamOwner with team GroupDeletion on Staging backend
And User TeamOwner configures MLS for team GroupDeletion
And TeamOwner enables channel feature for team GroupDeletion via backdoor
And User TeamOwner adds users Member1, Member2 to team GroupDeletion with role Member
And Member1 and Member2 add backend devices for later channel message delivery
And TeamOwner has channel conversation DeleteMe in team GroupDeletion
And TeamOwner has another channel conversation Stay in team GroupDeletion
And User Member1 and Member2 are available for channel participant selection
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
Then I see conversations DeleteMe and Stay in conversation list
When I tap on conversation name DeleteMe in conversation list
And I tap on channel conversation title DeleteMe to open group details
steps.statusMessage: Group conversation details for user 'DeleteMe' did not open.
